_training_anchor_meta.caveats: numerically_certified trust tier — root numbers computed via rigorous evaluation of the approximate functional equation combined with Selberg Trace Formula certification. Suitable as ground truth target in Learner training corpus. Per AA-019: this is the COMPLEMENT of anchor-maass_gl3-001 (ml_predicted).
_training_anchor_meta.prompt_template: Given the sequence of Dirichlet coefficients a_p and spectral parameters for the GL(3) Maass form {form_label}, evaluate the approximate functional equation to determine the exact root number.

scale.coverage_qualifier: Forms where rigorous Hejhal's algorithm and sufficient coefficient precision enable direct functional equation verification (sub-population dependent on high-precision numerical computation availability)

_training_anchor_meta.source: LMFDB Base Computations (Bian, Booker, Farmer, Koutsoliotas, Lemurell, Lowry-Duda)

_training_anchor_meta.caveats: ml_predicted trust tier — root numbers imputed via murmuration-density-based neural network inference, not direct functional-equation verification. Per AA-019 mitigation strategy: must NOT be used as ground truth in verification datasets; explicit trust_tier discipline prevents calibration poisoning of downstream ML models.
_training_anchor_meta.prompt_template: Given the sequence of transcendental Dirichlet coefficients a_p for the GL(3) Maass form {form_label}, determine the sign of the functional equation (root number).

scale.coverage_qualifier: Forms lacking sufficient coefficient precision for functional equation verification (approximate count; see BBCDLLDOQV SCGP 2024)

_training_anchor_meta.source: BBCDLLDOQV (Bieri, Butbaia, Costa, Deines, Lee, Lowry-Duda, Oliver, Qi, Veenstra) - SCGP 2024 / LMFDB Incomplete Maass Data
